title: Muddy's Music Cafe
desc: Muddy's Music Cafe is the place in SL where everyone knows your name. Find friends, fun, family and an old dog named Muddy at this long-lasting and popular club. Grab the little yellow Muddy's cab and head on over.

title: Warehouse 21
desc: Warehouse 21 is an Industrial/Steampunk themed underground music club. They have live DJs performing every day of the week! For DJ sets and live music gigs, see their calendar: tinyurl.com/yde4hjpy

title: Peak Lounge
desc: Established in 2014, Peak Lounge has evolved into a vibrant haven in Second Life, catering to residents who enjoy music and dancing. With the motto “Peace, love, and music,” this venue welcomes patrons to immerse themselves in a friendly atmosphere where live DJs from around the globe play an eclectic mix of tunes across various genres. In addition to the music, Peak Lounge serves as a social hub, a place to relax, meet new friends, and dance. The vibrant energy of PEAK creates an inviting space for everyone to express themselves and connect through the universal language of music. Regular events ensure that there's always something new to experience, making each visit a unique one.

title: London City
desc: London City has a multilevel freebie store with regularly updated mesh clothing and accessories. Additionally, there is a tutorial area, with Support staff to assist new Residents. You can enjoy daily events with free-to-enter contests and Linden Dollar prizes, live voice chat, a busking area, sandbox, pubs, clubs, concert area, and a large hangout park, where new and older residents mix. For details see mainlandlondon.blogspot.com

title: FogBound Blues
desc: Looking for a club where you can hear the blues and nothing but the blues? FogBound Blues is a hangout with friendly people, knowledgeable DJs, and some of SL's finest blues music performers.

title: Firestorm Gateway
desc: New residents are invited to learn the day-to-day basics of Second Life on this lush, wooded tutorial path. Learn movement, communication, outfits, and more. Assistance and mentoring are also available for new and experienced residents alike. All are welcome, but this tutorial zone is optimized for the Firestorm Viewer. (firestormviewer.org).

title: Backdrop City
desc: Backdrop City is an independent, nonprofit, community project. There is a sandbox area with a 4 hour return, along with hundreds of backdrops and scenes to use for photographers and bloggers. You can also join the free group to have access to the exclusive region with even more backdrops and updates.

title: Hypnotic Romance
desc: Hypnotic is a special place for love and romance with couples dances and secluded places to cuddle and kiss. Hidden throughout are special romantic animations. Can you find them? Bring your partner, lover or date...or come alone to meet someone with romance on their mind.

title: Ayuda Virtual
desc: Comunidad Comunidad de Recepción y Ayuda a nuevos usuarios a Second Life. Integrante del Proyecto Community Gateway. Para usuarios de habla hispana de todo el mundo.

title: Big Daddy’s Music Club
desc: Established in 2009, Big Daddy’s Music Club has built a lasting music community. This open-air PG destination is welcoming and newcomer-friendly, with experienced staff and long-standing VIP members. Enjoy Spot On dances, HUD or couples options, plus special events, a shopping mall, and advertising spaces. Relax, dance, and connect in a club rooted in community.

title: Welcome Hub Social Plaza
desc: Want a chill place to socialize? The Welcome Hub Social Plaza is your go-to! Located under the main dome at the Welcome Hub, meet friends old and new, share experiences, or simply watch the world go by. It is an ideal place for newcomers to get assistance and navigate to other parts of the Welcome Hub.

title: CrystalCraze HQ
desc: CrystalCraze is a fun and exciting interactive game and traffic booster. Visitors can simply grab a basket and start chasing crystals or searching the grounds for clusters. Apart from leveling up and receiving L$ rewards players get the chance to discover lots of interesting new places all over the grid!

title: Portal Park 2
desc: The Portal Park is your launching pad to several great experiences in Second Life. Start here for easy access portals that will teleport you to Winter Wonderland, The Cornfield, The Wilderness, Linden Realms and more!
